/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/quicklearn.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/quicklearn.dir/quicklearn_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quicklearn.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quicklearn.dir/pages/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quicklearn.dir/pages/lernsetwindow.cpp.o -o quicklearn  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
